note: Procyon sector adversaries. Tier = threat level, quality = combat skill.

1.name: Dyrinek Gang Member
1.description: A scrappy criminal from one of Procyon's smaller syndicates. Cheap weapon, cheaper loyalty.

1.name: Cobalt Dockworker
1.description: A union dockworker with strong arms and stronger opinions about who unloads what.

1.name: Scavenger
1.description: An unaffiliated operator scraping the margins. Usually not looking for a fight but will take one if it means surviving.

1.name: Echo Wave Rider
1.description: A low-ranking Way practitioner who has learned just enough to be dangerous to themselves and others.

2.name: Ashen Knives Enforcer
2.description: A professional criminal with augmented reflexes and a reputation for finishing jobs.

2.name: Borniko Hacker
2.description: A skilled data broker and systems intruder who fights with information rather than weapons.

2.name: Insurgent Fighter
2.description: A freedom fighter opposing Hegemony authority. Outgunned but experienced with guerrilla tactics.

2.name: Corp Sec Trooper
2.description: A professional security contractor with standard-issue armor and a policy manual thicker than a hull plate.

3.name: 51st Legion Soldier
3.description: Hegemonic military with full kit, combat experience, and a commander who is preparing a coup. Disciplined and dangerous.

3.name: Draxler's Raider Captain
3.description: A pirate captain who has survived long enough to get smart. Commands a loyal crew and a fast ship.

3.name: Maelstrom Pirate
3.description: One of Maelstrom's full-crew operators. The entire faction treats violence as a first resort and they are very good at it.

3.name: Agony Cultist (Shadow Witch)
3.description: A Way practitioner who has embraced the darker currents of the Void. The Agony's influence warps their perception and their attacks.

4.name: Scarlet Wolf Assassin
4.description: A Tier IV criminal operative who has never failed a contract. They've already studied the crew's patterns.

4.name: Lost Legion Commander
4.description: A commander from the Legion that vanished into the Void. They returned changed. Their troops follow without question and without hesitation.
4.weakness: what they brought back from the Void, the truth of what they are

4.name: Sah'iir Merchant Prince
4.description: A Sah'iir Way-user with blindfolded servants who speak for them. Their perception extends far beyond physical sight.
4.weakness: blocking Way access, disrupting their servant network

4.name: Suneater Researcher
4.description: An academic whose research has crossed every ethical boundary. The Precursor artifacts they've studied have studied them back.
4.weakness: loss of research materials, Way-users who can sense corruption
